commands.label: 74개 Node 자동 테스트
commands.stdout:
> relay10@0.1.1 test
> node --test

✔ parseModelCatalog normalizes Codex JSON and sorts by priority (0.740209ms)
✔ buildCatalog maps visible models to frontier, balanced, and economy (0.695125ms)
✔ explicit role overrides win and validate supported effort (0.236292ms)
✔ discoverCatalog injects execution and passes the configured invocation (0.131209ms)
✔ strict parser keeps boolean flags separate from following positional arguments (0.765334ms)
✔ strict parser rejects unknown, duplicate, missing-value, and boolean-value options (0.237ms)
✔ help bypasses required task validation without accepting unrelated options (0.072875ms)
✔ catalog discovery receives only trusted overrides, never configured executables or args (0.094792ms)
✔ dry-run budget validation is strict and checks the planned minimum (0.098333ms)
✔ verification commands require an explicit run opt-in (0.084583ms)
✔ run ids are strict and resolve only beneath the runs directory (6.672208ms)
✔ report and replay output contracts preserve the frozen run (0.404208ms)
✔ report output cannot alias the immutable report or manifest (2.335375ms)
✔ replay output rejects a physical path that enters the frozen run through a symlink (0.690167ms)
✔ dry-run validates verification opt-in and the planned call budget without executing (1.382167ms)
✔ an authorized run passes verification consent and the validated budget to the pipeline (0.312375ms)
✔ report defaults to a regenerated file and leaves the original immutable (1.711834ms)
✔ inspect prints the restored pipeline manifest runId and preserves warn exit status (0.914875ms)
✔ frozen replay verifies before atomically copying and never mutates run artifacts (2.174708ms)
✔ warn and fail statuses use the non-success exit code (0.052667ms)
✔ loadConfig returns a mutable copy of defaults when the file is absent (2.909542ms)
✔ loadConfig deep-merges validated JSON and expands environment variables (0.455167ms)
✔ expandEnvironment is recursive, supports fallback and escaped dollars (0.068333ms)
✔ loadConfig accepts $schema and the checked-in example matches defaults (2.255541ms)
✔ schema exposes the same secure catalog and verification surfaces (0.6445ms)
✔ loadConfig reports invalid JSON and missing environment variables (0.281375ms)
✔ validator rejects missing or unsupported versions and unknown root keys (0.138ms)
✔ project config cannot override the catalog executable or arguments (0.082291ms)
✔ validator enforces catalog role names and override structure (0.143ms)
✔ validator enforces routing ranges and threshold ordering (0.138333ms)
✔ validator enforces stage effort keys and values (0.084625ms)
✔ verification commands require structured executable and argument arrays (0.113167ms)
✔ reader gate ranges, uniqueness, mode, and model-call budget are coherent (0.217667ms)
✔ limits are bounded integers and reject unknown knobs (0.118ms)
✔ validateConfig returns a valid config without mutating it (0.064541ms)
✔ codexArgs keeps the scout read-only and applies model effort (0.639416ms)
✔ codexArgs does not pass the auto sentinel as a model (0.055ms)
✔ spawnCapture writes stdin without shell interpolation (24.79125ms)
✔ runVerification accepts argv objects and never interprets shell syntax (22.276583ms)
✔ spawnCapture caps stdout and stderr independently at 2 MiB (27.586708ms)
✔ spawnCapture kills the full POSIX process group after timeout (984.341958ms)
✔ mapPool preserves input order (4.555417ms)
✔ buildRunPlan counts deterministic and live reader calls (1.368084ms)
✔ runPipeline completes with injected model execution and writes a frozen report (30.641167ms)
✔ mutation without verification commands is WARN, never a verified pass (10.354084ms)
✔ a run never removes a workspace lock that it did not acquire (0.660583ms)
✔ Reader-10 exposes exactly ten named deterministic personas (0.405833ms)
✔ extractReadableText removes active content and preserves readable structure (0.482791ms)
✔ evaluateReader10 passes a structured and actionable Korean report (2.846417ms)
✔ evaluateReader10 rejects empty content and unsafe active embeds (0.645125ms)
✔ missing image alternative text is a critical Reader-10 failure (0.221375ms)
✔ aggregateReader10 requires at least nine passes and no critical issues (0.397333ms)
✔ payload audit rejects an unrelated summary even when a report template would look complete (0.320291ms)
✔ payload audit passes aligned content but does not claim semantic proof (0.22775ms)
✔ escapeHtml and sanitizeUrl reject HTML and executable URLs (0.881333ms)
✔ generateReport creates a self-contained, accessible Korean HTML report (2.441416ms)
✔ generateReport labels live Reader-10 as ten model calls without claiming independence (0.179666ms)
✔ generateReport labels deterministic-structure as automatic rules, not model readers (0.113709ms)
✔ generateReport presents pending live readers without implying execution or failure (0.186042ms)
✔ generateReport escapes every caller-provided HTML value and drops unsafe links (0.190375ms)
✔ generated full report clears the deterministic Reader-10 gate (2.23925ms)
✔ report rendering tolerates circular structured output (0.1135ms)
✔ simple read-only work stays economy and disables mutation stages (1.011042ms)
✔ security, deployment, and deletion language deterministically escalates risk (0.741958ms)
✔ explicit dimensions override heuristics and are validated (0.244541ms)
✔ routeTask emits all six stage contracts and a 10-reader clarity jury (0.86425ms)
✔ report and jury options adjust reader contracts without changing assessment (0.127416ms)
✔ parseCli separates positional arguments and flags (0.679708ms)
✔ writeJson creates parent directories (4.86025ms)
✔ concurrent writeJson calls leave one complete document and no temporary files (1.278708ms)
✔ writeJson removes its temporary file when rename fails (0.941083ms)
✔ readText propagates errors unless a missing-file fallback is explicit (0.824375ms)
✔ latestRun skips missing and malformed manifests (1.856ms)
✔ hash is deterministic and run ids include milliseconds plus an injected UUID suffix (1.087ms)
ℹ tests 74
ℹ suites 0
ℹ pass 74
ℹ fail 0
ℹ cancelled 0
ℹ skipped 0
ℹ todo 0
ℹ duration_ms 1113.156875

commands.label: 전체 JavaScript 문법 검사
commands.stdout:
> relay10@0.1.1 lint
> node --check src/*.mjs && node --check test/*.mjs && node --check scripts/*.mjs

commands.label: 출시 작업 모델 배정 미리보기
args: research current coding harnesses, build a lightweight CLI, verify it, and prepare a release
commands.commandLine: node src/cli.mjs route research current coding harnesses, build a lightweight CLI, verify it, and prepare a release --json
commands.stdout:
{
  "task": "research current coding harnesses, build a lightweight CLI, verify it, and prepare a release",
  "assessment": {
    "task": "research current coding harnesses, build a lightweight CLI, verify it, and prepare a release",
    "complexity": 0,
    "risk": 3,
    "blastRadius": 2,
    "verifiability": 3,
    "reversibility": 1,
    "score": 17,
    "role": "frontier",
    "readOnly": false
  },
  "stages": [
    {
      "id": "scout",
      "purpose": "Gather evidence and read source material.",
      "modelRole": "economy",
      "effort": "low",
      "mode": "read",
      "enabled": true,
      "writes": false,
      "output": "evidence",
      "model": "gpt-5.6-luna",
      "modelSource": "catalog"
    },
    {
      "id": "architect",
      "purpose": "Analyze evidence and produce the implementation plan.",
      "modelRole": "frontier",
      "effort": "max",
      "mode": "plan",
      "enabled": true,
      "writes": false,
      "output": "plan",
      "model": "gpt-5.6-sol",
      "modelSource": "catalog"
    },
    {
      "id": "maker",
      "purpose": "Implement the approved plan in the isolated workspace.",
      "modelRole": "balanced",
      "effort": "medium",
      "mode": "write",
      "enabled": true,
      "writes": true,
      "output": "changes",
      "model": "gpt-5.6-terra",
      "modelSource": "catalog"
    },
    {
      "id": "reviewer",
      "purpose": "Verify correctness, safety, and acceptance criteria.",
      "modelRole": "frontier",
      "effort": "high",
      "mode": "verify",
      "enabled": true,
      "writes": false,
      "output": "review",
      "model": "gpt-5.6-sol",
      "modelSource": "catalog"
    },
    {
      "id": "explainer",
      "purpose": "Create the final human-facing HTML explanation.",
      "modelRole": "balanced",
      "effort": "low",
      "mode": "report",
      "enabled": true,
      "writes": true,
      "output": "html",
      "model": "gpt-5.6-terra",
      "modelSource": "catalog"
    },
    {
      "id": "reader",
      "purpose": "Judge whether the report is understandable without hidden context.",
      "modelRole": "economy",
      "effort": "low",
      "mode": "read",
      "enabled": true,
      "writes": false,
      "fanout": 10,
      "quorum": 9,
      "maxRounds": 2,
      "output": "clarity-verdicts",
      "model": "gpt-5.6-luna",
      "modelSource": "catalog"
    }
  ],
  "liveReaders": false,
  "invocationEstimate": {
    "minimum": 5,
    "maximum": 5,
    "unit": "codex-exec-invocations"
  },
  "callEstimate": {
    "minimum": 5,
    "maximum": 5,
    "unit": "codex-exec-invocations"
  }
}
